headline: UBS Upgrades Nucor (NUE) to Buy, Sees Opportunity after “Excessive Correction”
summary: Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio for Income: 15 Stocks to Invest In. On March 26, UBS Group analyst Andrew Jones upgraded Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) to Buy from Neutral and raised the price target to $190 from $184. The analyst pointed to the recent “excessive correction” as a buying opportunity. He […]

headline: How Stronger Q1 2026 EPS Guidance And Geopolitical Insulation At Nucor (NUE) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Nucor Corporation recently issued earnings guidance for the first quarter of 2026, projecting diluted earnings per share between US$2.70 and US$2.80, while several research firms updated their views following this outlook. Analysts highlighted that Nucor’s largely domestic-focused operations, limited direct energy exposure and growing steel mill backlog may help support its performance despite geopolitical tensions. Next, we’ll examine how Nucor’s stronger first-quarter guidance and...
